MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-15-2016 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-24-2015 Set For Trial On Sep-12-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Plaintiffs Discovery Responses And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiffs
Off Calendar Dec-07-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. CHUE MUSSELMAN, ESQ. of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith, Tel No. 415-438-5933 appearing for Defendants CELLE FAMILY PARTNERS LP, ELLEN NEVAREZ, CECILIA MOSTAGHIM, AND AREF MOSTAGHIM;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - Defense counsel stipulates to the matter being heard by the pro tem judge. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. As to DEFENDANTS CELLE FAMILY PARTNERS LP, ELLEN NEVAREZ, CECILIA MOSTAGHIM, AND AREF MOSTAGHIM'S Motion For Order Compelling Plaintiffs' Discovery Responses And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiffs, no opposition was filed to defendant's motion to compel responses to discovery requests to plaintiffs. Accordingly, the court will sign the proposed order, except that it will delete the line "including one based upon privilege or on the protection for work product." It may be that plaintiffs failure to respond will be deemed to constitute a waiver of the attorney/client privilege. However, the court is not prepared to make that determination at this point. The sanctions requested is assessed and sanctions in the amount of $1,355.00 are ordered. Payment of sanctions must be made within 10 days of this order. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-10-2015 Set For Trial On May-02-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Sep-23-2015 Off Calendar

Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens And For Payment Of Attorneys Fees And Costs
Off Calendar May-11-2015 Advanced From Jun-01-15 To May-14-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501

Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens And For Payment Of Attorneys Fees And Costs
Off Calendar May-14-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Allison Pascal, Esquire. Of ZTA (415-977-0444 x31) for Plaintiff/ opposing party Salma & Company, Inc..
Robert Cohen, Esquire. (800-492-2657) for Defendant/ Moving party CELLE FAMILY PARTNERS LP, ELLEN NEVAREZ, CECILIA MOSTAGHIM, and AREF MOSTAGHIM.

The Court informs the party that the only issue remaining is whether to grant attorney's fees and costs since the lis pendens has been withdrawn. Plaintiff argues that the motion for attorney's fees is moot. Defendant cites case law Castro vs Superior Court. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT CELLE FAMILY PARTNERS LP, ELLEN NEVAREZ, CECILIA MOSTAGHIM, AREF MOSTAGHIM Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens is off calendar And Motion for Payment Of Attorneys Fees And Costs Is taken under submission. The Court will issue a tentative ruling and if it is granted, the Court will permit opposing side to submit a supplemental brief. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
